title: A vernier calliper for measuring linear dimensions of an article
abstract: The present invention is to provide a vernier calliper (100) for measuring linear dimensions of an article. The vernier calliper (100) is having an external jaw (210) including a fixed jaw (110) and a movable jaw (120). The articles for measuring are placed between the fixed jaw (110) and the movable jaw (120). The vernier calliper (100) is also provided with an operating member (130) and a knob (140). The operating member (130) is operably connected to the movable jaw (120) with a gear mechanism (150) therebetween. The operating member (130) is operated manually to move the movable jaw (120) towards and or away from the fixed jaw (110). Further, the knob (140) is arranged on the vernier calliper (100) for changing the direction of movement of the movable jaw (120) upon operating the operating member (130).
claims: Claims We Claim: 1. A vernier calliper for measuring linear dimensions of an article, the vernier calliper comprising: an external jaw and an internal jaw, the external jaw includes a fixed jaw and a movable jaw, the articles for measuring are placed between the fixed jaw and the movable jaw; wherein an operating member is operably connected to the movable jaw with a gear mechanism therebetween, upon operating the operating member the movable jaw moves towards and away from the fixed jaw. 2. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein the gear mechanism is a gear train including a plurality of gears aligned to transmit rotational motion between the operating member and the movable jaw. 3. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein the operating member is partially arranged inside a casing configured on a distal end of the vernier calliper with a portion of the operating member accessible from outside the casing. 4. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein one end of the operating member is pivoted on a pivotal axis, and another end of the operating member has a geared configuration which is engageably connected to the gear mechanism. 1 5. The vernier calliper as claimed in claims 1 and 2, wherein the gear mechanism is supportably configured on a disk and the gear mechanism is connected to a bell crank lever arranged inside the casing. 6. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1 wherein a knob is arranged for changing the direction of movement of the movable jaw. 7. The vernier calliper as claimed in claims 2 and 6 wherein the knob is arranged on the periphery of the casing and the knob has an extending portion which connects to a connecting member arranged inside the casing. 8. The vernier calliper as claimed in claims 4 and 7, wherein the connecting member is operably connected to the bell crank lever. 9. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein the movement of the operating member enables the gear mechanism to operate which facilitate to moves the movable jaw towards and away from the fixed jaw. 10. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein at least one of the gear from the gear mechanism is engagably connected to the movable jaw and the rotation of the at least one gear allows the movable jaw to move translationally in an axis. 2 11. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1 , wherein a rack extends along the length of the main scale and connects with the movable jaw, the engagement of the gear with the rack while rotating the at least one gear enables the movement of the rack and thereby moves the movable jaw towards or away from the fixed jaw. 12. The vernier calliper as claimed in claims 1 and 6, wherein when the knob is in a first position, the movable jaw moves toward the fixed jaw and when the knob is in a second position, the movable jaw moves away from the fixed jaw upon operating the operating member. 13. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 12, wherein when the knob is in the first position, the connecting member moves one end of the bell crank lever downwards which allows a first gear from the gear mechanism to engage with the rack, the rotation of the first gear enables the rack to move the movable jaw towards the fixed jaw. 14. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 12, wherein when the knob is in the second position, the connecting member moves one end of the bell crank lever upwards which disengages the first gear and allows a fourth gear from the gear mechanism to engage with the rack, the rotation of the fourth gear enables the rack to move the movable jaw away from the fixed jaw. 3 15. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein the operating member may be an electrically operated motor which rotates the gear mechanism to move the movable jaw towards and or away from the fixed jaw. 16. The vernier calliper as claimed in claim 1, wherein the operating member is an electrically operated motor which rotates the gear mechanism to move the movable jaw towards and or away from the fixed jaw. 4
